storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_sprint_the_field_1_title}Sprint across the field
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_sprint_the_field_1_setup}The signal goes before first light. Half a mile at a run through stubble fields, kit rattling, breath loud in your ears. The village fires are already visible when you reach the ditch.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_scale_the_fence_1_title}Over the field fence
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_scale_the_fence_1_setup}There is a stone fence between the column and the granary. Low, but long. You find the gap first and pull two men through behind you. Small thing. It counts.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_chase_runner_1_title}Runner in the yard
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_chase_runner_1_setup}A man bolts from the farmstead when the gate opens. The sergeant points. You run. Across the yard, through the kitchen garden, into the tree line. You catch him before the slope.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_chase_runner_1_opt}Run him down before the tree line.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_door_work_1_title}Breaking the granary door
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_door_work_1_setup}The granary door is braced from inside. You work the hinge side with a wrecking bar until the frame splits. The grain is still warm from yesterday's sun. Someone starts filling sacks.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_cart_assess_1_title}What the cart is worth
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_cart_assess_1_setup}Two carts in the yard — one loaded with grain, one with tools and household goods. The sergeant tells you to pick the one worth keeping. You walk both and make the call.

options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_cart_assess_1_tt}Assess spoils under time pressure. Roguery + Trade XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_quiet_cut_1_title}Quiet work before the alarm
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_quiet_cut_1_setup}You go in ahead of the column — two men at the watch-post, no shouting. The village does not know you are here yet. That gap belongs to you.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_quiet_cut_1_opt}Move in the dark. Keep it quiet.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_sword_work_1_title}Resistance at the farmstead
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_sword_work_1_setup}Three men with farm tools and desperation come out of the barn. It is brief and ugly. Afterwards you wipe your blade on the grass and don't think about it.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_clear_the_hall_1_title}Clearing the hall
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_clear_the_hall_1_setup}The estate hall is narrow and dark. Furniture, doorframes, a staircase. Everything moves wrong in a fight here. You keep your blade short and your footing honest.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_hold_the_line_1_title}Holding the approach
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_hold_the_line_1_setup}A militia column is forming at the far end of the village. Your sergeant wants three men across the road while the rest finish. You are one of the three.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_cavalry_sweep_1_title}Cavalry sweep on the flanks
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_cavalry_sweep_1_setup}The riders go wide to cut off the road north. You push your horse hard through standing grain, picking lines between the field boundaries. The gap closes fast.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_cavalry_sweep_1_opt}Cut the road before they reach it.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_herd_the_livestock_1_title}Driving off the livestock
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_herd_the_livestock_1_setup}Cattle don't want to go and pigs are worse. You spend an hour on horseback driving them east while the cattle bellow and the pigs double back.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_withdrawal_1_title}Riding out before dawn
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_withdrawal_1_setup}The sergeant calls the withdrawal while smoke is still rising. You ride back in column, faster than you came, the horses knowing the way.

options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_withdrawal_1_tt}Mounted withdrawal under pressure. Riding + Tactics XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_read_the_village_1_title}Reading the village layout
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_read_the_village_1_setup}Before the column moves, you ride a circuit of the target settlement. Guard posts, exits, where the granaries sit relative to the lord's house. Small map. Counts when the shooting starts.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_spare_the_village_1_title}The headman's offer
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_spare_the_village_1_setup}The headman comes out with grain tallies and a ledger. He wants to surrender the stores without the burning. Your sergeant looks at you. You know the lord's orders. You also know what the fires cost.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_spare_the_village_1_opt}Hear him out. Relay it up the chain.
options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_spare_the_village_1_tt}Negotiated surrender of stores. Charm + Steward XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_burn_the_thatch_1_title}Torches to the thatch
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_burn_the_thatch_1_setup}The order comes down: leave nothing standing. You carry a torch to the nearest roof. The thatch goes fast. You work three more before the heat drives you back. Orders are orders.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_burn_the_thatch_1_opt}Carry the torch. Don't watch too long.
options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_burn_the_thatch_1_tt}Fire detail under orders. Engineering + Smithing XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_crossbow_volley_1_title}Volley at the barricade
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_crossbow_volley_1_setup}Villagers have dragged carts across the lane. Your section puts bolts at the gaps while the foot soldiers work the flanks. Short range, no wind. Count the bolts.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_polearm_push_1_title}Spear through the gate
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_polearm_push_1_setup}The gate is narrow. Two men with poles can hold the press while the rest filter through. You take one side. Three minutes of shoving and the gate is yours.

options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_polearm_push_1_tt}Gate fight with polearms. Polearm + TwoHanded XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_wounded_after_1_title}Wounded after the raid
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_wounded_after_1_setup}One of your section took a scythe across the forearm. Not deep, but the wound is dirty. You pack it with what you have and tie it off while he complains about the waste of good cloth.

options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_wounded_after_1_tt}Field dressing after a skirmish. Medicine + Leadership XP.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_javelin_throw_1_title}Javelin at the watch-post
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_javelin_throw_1_setup}There is a man at the watch-post on the far rise. Twenty-five paces. Your sergeant doesn't want shouting. You have two javelins.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_new_threat_1_title}Riders on the eastern ridge
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_new_threat_1_setup}New word from the scouts: armed riders have appeared on the eastern ridge. The raid continues but the column is nervous. You watch the skyline while the others work.

options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_new_threat_1_tt}New threat on the flank. Scouting XP, readiness up.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_dispersal_risk_1_title}Column starting to peel
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_dispersal_risk_1_setup}Word is the army may dissolve. Men are already talking about where to go next. The raid stays mechanical but the discipline is fraying at the edges.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_dispersal_risk_1_opt}Keep your section together. See it through.
options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_dispersal_risk_1_tt}Army cohesion breaking. Tactics XP, scrutiny up.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_prisoner_update_1_title}Prisoners from the raid
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_prisoner_update_1_setup}There are prisoners now — three men from the estate guard. The sergeant wants them questioned before dark. You sit across from the eldest and find out what he knows.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_prisoner_update_1_opt}Sit with him. Find out what's worth knowing.

storylets.title: {=duty_raiding_supply_break_1_title}Raiding for rations
storylets.setup: {=duty_raiding_supply_break_1_setup}The supply line has broken. The raid is no longer just strategy — it's dinner. You help load the grain carts with a soldier's attention to weight and waste that wasn't there before.

options.text: {=duty_raiding_supply_break_1_opt}Pack the carts carefully. Every sack counts.
options.tooltip: {=duty_raiding_supply_break_1_tt}Raiding for food. Supplies up, Steward XP.
